name: Spider-Man
description:
Hey there, everyone!

Ayano here! Wu and I have been at it again, creating another awesome bot for... well, my nonexistent followers (shoutout to my mom, I guess?). After the wild success of our last bot—which totally didn’t crash and burn—we’re bringing you something even cooler!

Say hello to Spider-Man’s very own AI assistant-building journey, starring you as his creation! Whether you’re a die-hard fan of Peter Parker or just here for the witty one-liners, this bot is here to deliver the action, charm, and awkward genius that makes Spider-Man so iconic.

Credits to the artist!
creator: Louayano
